subcodes.first_line: Hidden and concealed was He; He desired to manifest and reveal Himself, wherefore through His exalted Word He brought into being all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مخفی و مستور بود بظهور و بروز میل فرمود لذا بکلمه علیا خلق نمود آنچه را که
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @work as worship
